docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NANTHAKUMAR, NISANTHAN AS TO DEFENDANT SF 1A 3474 17TH LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NANTHAKUMAR, NISANTHAN AS TO DEFENDANT SF 1A 3474 17TH LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-03-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SF 1A 3474 17TH LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGELIQUE MONDARES FILED BY DEFENDANT SF 1A 3474 17TH LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-29-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT WITH EACH OTHER IN COURT. THE CASE IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF THE PARTIES DO NOT SHOW UP THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NISANTHAN NANTHAKUMAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF 1A 3474 17TH LLC IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROGRESS REPORT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. BY VISITING JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NISANTHAN NANTHAKUMAR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF 1A 3474 17TH LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
